flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Southern Connecticut State University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($11.9k → $13.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Southern Connecticut State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.7% → 0.0%).
